about.content: I am currently pursuing a B.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science while exploring the frontiers of Agentic AI. Over the last few years, I've competed in over 10+ hackathons, securing top podium finishes at events like Innovatex and VIT Hackbuild. Right now, I'm focused on building Markdrop, a powerful visual markdown editor for developers.

projects.title: Markdrop
projects.description: I built Markdrop to streamline documentation. It is a visual editor with a drag-and-drop interface and cloud sync, allowing developers to create professional READMEs without dealing with raw syntax.

projects.title: AnalyserGPT
projects.description: AnalyserGPT demonstrates the potential of agentic workflows in data science. By orchestrating a team of specialized AI agents—including a Code Writer, a Data Analyst, and a Reviewer—the system can autonomously take a raw dataset, formulate hypotheses, write and execute analysis code, and generate comprehensive reports. Fully containerized with Docker, it ensures a consistent and isolated execution environment for the generated code, prioritizing security and reproducibility.

projects.title: KisaanCredit
projects.description: KisaanCredit empowers small-scale farmers to participate in the global carbon credit market. Traditionally barred by high verification costs, farmers can now use this platform to prove their sustainable practices via satellite imagery analysis and AI verification. Credits are minted as tokens on the blockchain, ensuring transparency and traceability. A gamified mobile interface encourages continued adoption of eco-friendly farming techniques.

projects.title: Replacement Calculator
projects.description: This application serves as a practical tool for Operational Research, solving the classic Equipment Replacement Problem. It provides a graphical interface for users to input cost variables—maintenance, capital, and resale value—and algorithms to compute the optimal replacement age. The tool visualizes the average annual cost curve, making complex decision-making data easily interpretable for business owners and students.

hackathons.title: Minithon
hackathons.description: Ranked in **Top 8 finalists**. Built **TSEC - Student Dashboard**, a responsive front-end tool for managing student tasks and schedules.

hackathons.title: TSEC Innovatex
hackathons.description: Secured **3rd place**. Built **PaperSprint**, a 15-minute document print-and-delivery platform featuring secure authentication and cloud storage integration.

hackathons.title: Need for Code
hackathons.description: Developed **MineSave**, a miner safety mechanism designed to detect hazards and improve communication in low-connectivity underground environments.

hackathons.title: VIT Hackbuild
hackathons.description: Secured **Top 3 in Web/App domain**. Built **SkillVerse**, a secure student freelance marketplace. Features include AI-driven proposal generation, verified skill assessments, and a Solidity smart contract for transparent, immutable transaction records.

hackathons.title: NABARD Hackathon
hackathons.description: Developed **KisaanCredit**, a 'Soil to Sale' ecosystem using AI and Blockchain to democratize carbon markets for farmers.

hackathons.title: Codeisance
hackathons.description: Competed in a 24-hour hackathon. Developed **LifeSave**, a comprehensive platform using Agentic AI systems to streamline blood and organ donation by intelligently connecting donors, hospitals, and blood banks.

hackathons.title: Smart India Hackathon (SIH)
hackathons.description: Qualified in the internal round. Developed two major projects: **CiviSeva**, an AI-powered civic reporting platform with geospatial analysis and automated routing; and **Forensight**, a digital forensics tool utilizing multi-agent AI for automated evidence analysis and network visualization.

hackathons.title: Hacksync 2026
hackathons.description: Ranked in **Top 4 in AI/ML** and **Top 10 overall**. Built **Mirage**, an emotionally-intelligent AI companion featuring real-time emotion detection, 3D avatar lip-sync, and contextual memory.

hackathons.title: Rubix 2026
hackathons.description: Secured **Top 10 overall**. Developed **RubixProctor**, a comprehensive proctoring ecosystem featuring dual-device 360° monitoring, agentic bot detection, offline resilience, and system lockdown capabilities via a custom Chrome extension and Electron app.
